description: Provider-agnostic TTS gateway and CLI for AI coding harnesses
notes: narrate is installed. Start the server with:  narrate-server
Then speak with:  narrate "hello from Windows"
The system provider uses Windows SAPI (System.Speech) - no API key needed.
For premium voices add keys to %USERPROFILE%\.env (ELEVENLABS_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY).
Run the server at login: see packaging/scoop/README.md (Task Scheduler).
